name: OpenClaw
description: Connect to an OpenClaw autonomous AI agent instance — send messages and receive responses via the OpenAI-compatible Gateway API

credentials_required.label: OpenClaw Gateway URL
credentials_required.hint: Gateway URL of the OpenClaw instance (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:18789 or via Tailnet/tunnel)

credentials_required.label: OpenClaw Gateway Token
credentials_required.hint: Bearer token for the Gateway API (see OpenClaw config)

tools.name: openclaw_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to an OpenClaw agent and get the response

author: freddy-schuetz
